fixtures._comment: Single-turn scenario A and turn 1 of multi-turn scenario C: first LLM call before any tool runs.
Single-turn scenario A and turn 1 of multi-turn scenario C: follow-up LLM call after tool result.

Multi-turn scenario C, turn 2: first LLM call. assistant_count==2 (tool-call from turn 1 + final reply from turn 1). hasToolResult would be true here (transcript carries turn 1's tool message), so we use turnIndex instead.
Multi-turn scenario C, turn 2: follow-up after tool result.
